scripts.dev:frontends: concurrently --names admin,customer,driver --prefix-colors blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:customer" "npm run dev:driver-app"
scripts.test:contract: npm -w services/driver-service run test -- --runInBand src/__tests__/contracts/internal-driver-response.contract.test.ts && npm -w services/ride-service run test -- --runInBand src/__tests__/contracts/driver-service.contract.test.ts
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend
scripts.build:backend: npm -w services/api-gateway run build && npm -w services/auth-service run build && npm -w services/user-service run build && npm -w services/ride-service run build && npm -w services/driver-service run build && npm -w services/payment-service run build && npm -w services/notification-service run build && npm -w services/review-service run build && npm -w services/booking-service run build && npm -w services/pricing-service run build
scripts.build:services: npm -w services/auth-service run build && npm -w services/ride-service run build && npm -w services/driver-service run build && npm -w services/payment-service run build && npm -w services/booking-service run build && npm -w services/pricing-service run build && npm -w services/api-gateway run build
